HTML.SafeObject TYPE: bool VERSION: 3.1.1 DEFAULT: false --DESCRIPTION-- <p> Whether or not to permit object tags in documents, with a number of extra security features added to prevent script execution. This is similar to what websites like MySpace do to object tags. You should also enable %Output.FlashCompat in order to generate Internet Explorer compatibility code for your object tags. </p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
